ocean_and_wildlife_adjacencies: If you crave exploration and discovery, this trip is tailored for you. Trek through lush jungles, encounter wildlife and snorkel in azure waters for an unforgettable escapade.

If your idea of paradise involves powdery beaches, crystal-clear waters and tropical serenity, this trip is your ticket to bliss. Unwind on pristine shores and let the waves lull you into tranquility.
Immerse yourself in the rich tapestry of Sri Lanka and the Maldives, from ancient temples to pristine beaches. Each day brings new landscapes and cultural treasures.

Dive into unique activities, like a sunrise hot air balloon ride over the Sigiriya rock fortress or snorkeling in the crystal-clear waters of the Maldives. Create memories that linger long after the journey ends.

ocean_and_wildlife_adjacencies: Nature enthusiasts will find solace in the diverse landscapes traversed. From pristine beaches to lush mountains, this trip is a sanctuary for those seeking to reconnect with the natural world and its wonders.
If you crave excitement and love pushing boundaries, this trip caters to thrill-seekers. Whether trekking through dense jungles or diving into the ocean depths, adventure awaits.

tour_overview.package_name: Wrecks & Reefs | Snorkeling, Diving & Marine life Tour in Sri Lanka

ocean_and_wildlife_adjacencies: Dive into the rich maritime history of Sri Lanka as you explore captivating shipwrecks and vibrant coral reefs, creating unforgettable memories in the depths of the Indian Ocean.
Our experienced guides and certified dive instructors ensure not just a thrilling expedition but a safe one too. Dive with confidence as you explore the mesmerizing wrecks and reefs of Ceylon.

Indulge in exclusive stays at Jetwing’s handpicked coastal properties, offering a perfect blend of modern comforts and serene oceanfront views, ensuring a relaxing and rejuvenating experience after each day’s adventure.
If you appreciate eco-friendly tourism, rest assured that our excursions prioritize sustainability. Join us in responsible diving practices, preserving the marine ecosystem for generations to come.
Seeking a balance of adventure and relaxation? This trip lets you escape the hustle, providing a chance to unwind on pristine beaches and savor the coastal charm of Sri Lanka.
Immerse yourself in a world of colorful marine life, from elusive sea turtles to dazzling schools of fish. Discover the joy of snorkeling and diving in crystal-clear waters.

Whether you seek relaxation or adventure, the Southern Riviera caters to varied preferences. Tailor your experience, from tranquil beachside retreats to exhilarating outdoor escapades, ensuring a personalized journey.
If you yearn for nature’s embrace, from lush landscapes to pristine beaches, this trip beckons. Revel in the biodiversity of the Southern Riviera, a haven for wildlife and eco-enthusiasts.

experience_profile.description: A mix of modern architecture and cultural significance, the complex comprises the main temple, a museum, a library and a vocational training centre.
Revered by pilgrims from around the world, the ‘Sri Dalada Maligawa’ is a sacred Buddhist shrine housing a tooth relic of Lord Buddha.
Watch how these expert fishermen set up their stilts and cast their rods, and perhaps try your fishing skills on the crossbar too.
Endangered giant turtles nest on the Rekawa shoreline; here, you can learn more about their habits, habitats and help release hatchlings to sea.
Kallady is Sri Lanka’s oldest and longest iron bridge. Popular legend claims that sounds of singing fish can be heard from beneath it.
Walk to this much sought after location, made famous by instagram, to understand why this protruding grove of coconut is so very special.
The 15th century Nallur Kandaswamy Kovil - one of the most significant Hindu temples in Sri Lanka - showcases the colourful grandeur of Dravidian architecture.
Take a walk through paddy fields and ‘chena’ cultivations to a rural village home for a typical Sri Lankan lunch - rice and curry.
The largest and the best preserved cave monastery in the island, its five sanctuaries comprise 157 statues and intricate frescoes covering the walls.
If you fancy your turn on the board, there are many surf schools and qualified instructors to help you hit the waves safely.
